name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 8 Jun 2023
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release, we are overjoyed to bring you our revamped Drag and Drop editor. Also, check out the upgrades made to the POST/contacts REST API."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more details, please read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENTS","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Drag and Drop Editor – UI Revamp","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The modernized Drag and Drop editor is clutter-free and user-friendly. Apart from a better look and feel, the new UI provides you the ease of use."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Some of the notable changes are:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Prominently displayed content name and edit option."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Better visibility for Save as Template option."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Save","bold":true},{"text":" button is now positioned along with the "},{"text":"Save and Close","bold":true},{"text":" button so that it’s available even if you change tabs."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Preview is now available as a separate tab."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Improved UI for the Footer tab and Custom Row Categories tab."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Easier to use Merge Tag."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The advanced tab is improved with an intuitive design and guided texts."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about the Drag and Drop editor and its features, get started at "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Drag-and-Drop-Editor","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Drag and Drop Editor","bold":true}]},{"text":". "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/DnDReleaseNotes.0685g00000EkBTAAA3.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/DnDReleaseNotes.0685g00000EkBTAAA3.jpg","name":"DnD_Release Notes","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1791,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Contacts REST API Update","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When creating a new contact list using the POST/contacts API, you can now create new contact tags. Previously, if the "},{"text":"add_tags","bold":true},{"text":" array in the POST/contacts method included a tag that didn’t exist, the application simply ignored it. Now, a new contact tag will be created using the passed parameter values."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Here's a sample input payload for POST/contacts API:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"{"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" \"contact\": {"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" \"first_name\": \"ChatBot\","}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" \"email\": \"ChatBot@gmail.com\","}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" \"last_name\": \"Monk\","}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "},{"text":"\"add_tags\": [","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" \"armedMonk\",","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" \"tag_name\"","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" ],","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" \"subscribe\": true,"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" \"remove_from_dnm\": true"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" }"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"}"}]}]
